evals.prompt: Split this epic into stories: 'Customers can pay invoices online with card or bank transfer, get receipts, and see payment history.'
evals.expected_output: Epic grouped and split by workflow/happy-path-first into INVEST-compliant stories with Given/When/Then criteria, payment slices flagged for security criteria.
expectations: Stories follow persona format with meaningful 'so that' clauses
Split is by workflow or data variation, not by architecture layer
Each story has happy path plus at least one failure-path criterion

evals.prompt: Write acceptance criteria for: 'As a fund accountant, I want to reconcile daily positions so that discrepancies are caught before NAV publication.'
evals.expected_output: Testable Given/When/Then criteria covering successful reconciliation, discrepancy detection, and edge cases (missing feeds, late data).
expectations: Criteria are executable by QA verbatim
Includes failure/edge paths, not just the happy path

evals.prompt: Turn these raw requirements into stories: system shall lock sessions after 15 min idle; users must be able to export reports as CSV; when a feed fails the system shall alert operations.
evals.expected_output: Requirements mapped to appropriate formats - EARS for the system-level rules, persona stories for the user-facing export - grouped sensibly.
expectations: Uses EARS patterns for system-level requirements
Uses persona format where a real user role exists
Presents grouping before exploding into stories
